fields.label: Lease
fields.description: Lease record for which renewal is being requested.

fields.label: Renewal Sequence
fields.description: Sequential number for repeated renewal cycles on the same lease.

fields.label: Workflow State
fields.options:
Draft
Department Review
Finance Review
Legal Review
Management Approval
Approved
Rejected
Completed
fields.description: Current approval step in the renewal workflow.

fields.label: Open Cycle Key
fields.description: Hidden key used to enforce one open renewal cycle per lease.

fields.label: Current Start Date
fields.description: Snapshot of the active lease start date at the time of request.

fields.label: Current End Date
fields.description: Snapshot of the active lease end date at the time of request.

fields.label: Current Currency
fields.description: Currency from the current lease snapshot.

fields.label: Current Monthly Rent
fields.description: Monthly rent captured from the current lease snapshot.

fields.label: Current Annual Rent
fields.description: Annual rent captured from the current lease snapshot.

fields.label: Current Payment Frequency
fields.description: Payment frequency captured from the current lease snapshot.

fields.label: Proposed Property
fields.description: Property intended for the renewed or replacement lease.

fields.label: Proposed Start Date
fields.description: Requested start date for the new or renewed term.

fields.label: Proposed End Date
fields.description: Requested end date for the new or renewed term.

fields.label: Proposed Notice Date
fields.description: Planned date for notice to be served under the proposed terms.

fields.label: Proposed Currency
fields.description: Currency that applies to the proposed commercial terms.

fields.label: Proposed Rent Basis
fields.options:
Monthly
Annual
Per Square Metre
Fixed Term
Other
fields.description: How rent is proposed to be structured for the new term.

fields.label: Proposed Monthly Rent
fields.description: Monthly rent proposed for the renewal term, if applicable.

fields.label: Proposed Annual Rent
fields.description: Annual rent proposed for the renewal term.

fields.label: Proposed Payment Frequency
fields.description: How often the proposed rent would be paid.

fields.label: Proposed Escalation Rule
fields.description: Planned rent escalation or indexation terms for the proposal.

fields.label: Recommendation
fields.description: Recommended business action for the lease at renewal time.

fields.label: Termination Effective Date
fields.description: Required before submitting a termination for review.

fields.label: Termination Reason
fields.description: Required before submitting a termination for review.

fields.label: Business Justification
fields.description: Why the recommendation is being made from a business perspective.

fields.label: Risk Assessment
fields.description: Operational, financial, or legal risks associated with the recommendation.

fields.label: Budget Impact
fields.description: Estimated budget change caused by the proposed action.

fields.label: Alternative Options
fields.description: Other viable actions or scenarios considered before submitting the request.

fields.label: Current Approver Role
fields.description: Role currently expected to review or approve the request.

fields.label: Workflow Comment
fields.description: Latest short comment entered during workflow review.

fields.label: Decision History
fields.description: Read-only log of every workflow action taken on the request.

fields.label: Requested By
fields.description: User who created the renewal request.

fields.label: Requested On
fields.description: Date the renewal request was created.

fields.label: Final Decision By
fields.description: User who recorded the final approval or rejection.

fields.label: Final Decision On
fields.description: Date the final decision was recorded.

fields.label: Rejection Reason
fields.description: Reason captured when the request is rejected.

fields.label: Completion Date
fields.description: Date the renewal cycle was completed.

fields.label: Successor Lease
fields.description: Linked lease created after the renewal request is completed.
